evals.prompt: Run /commit after making a change to a source file
evals.expected_output: A clean commit with Conventional Commits format and no AI attribution
expectations: Commit message uses Conventional Commits format (<type>(<scope>): <summary>)
Commit message does NOT contain 'Co-Authored-By' with any AI reference
Commit message does NOT contain 'Claude', 'Anthropic', 'AI', 'GPT', or 'LLM'
Commit message does NOT contain 'noreply@anthropic.com'
Post-commit verification scans the message for forbidden patterns
A summary is displayed showing branch, commit hash, and docs updated

evals.prompt: Run /commit after adding a new component file in src/components/
evals.expected_output: Commit is created AND relevant context docs are checked and updated if stale
expectations: CLAUDE.md is checked for stale Project Structure or Key Files sections
docs/architecture.md is checked for missing component documentation
docs/ pages are checked for stale feature documentation
Only docs with actually stale content are modified
Updated docs are staged and included in the same commit

evals.prompt: Run /commit after modifying test files only
evals.expected_output: Commit is created AND docs/TESTING.md is checked for updates
expectations: docs/TESTING.md is checked for stale test patterns or structure
CLAUDE.md and docs/architecture.md are NOT unnecessarily modified
Commit type reflects test changes (e.g., test: or fix:)

evals.prompt: Run /commit on a branch named feature/123-user-auth
expectations: Ticket ID 123 is extracted from the branch name
Commit body includes 'Refs: #123'
Commit message follows Conventional Commits format

evals.prompt: Run /commit when there are no changes
expectations: Output says working tree is clean or nothing to commit
No empty commit is created
No errors or crashes

evals.expected_output: Commit uses the hint in the message
expectations: The commit message incorporates the user's hint about fixing the login bug
Commit still follows Conventional Commits format
No AI attribution is present
